_comment: §6 designer cast — the four Nigerian designer personas verbatim from the web mock seed (web/src/mocks/seed.ts seedDesigners), incl. eniola.stitches (Abuja) — the non-Lagos contrast that makes explore's near-me proximity ranking visible. Avatars follow the web audit rule: each designer fronts their OWN published work (initials-only reads as broken beside the canvas); media URLs use the web /demo/* form and resolve to assets/seed/dev/demo/*.

designers.bio: Ankara & contemporary tailoring. Lagos. Made-to-measure only.
Agbada, senator suits, and sharp menswear.
Aso-oke ceremonial wear — weddings, chieftaincy, statement pieces.
Bespoke womenswear from the Abuja atelier — corporate and occasion.
